commands.start: Start using the sticker downloader bot
commands.start_desc_group:
👋 Hello! Use the /get command and reply to a sticker message, and I will convert it to image or video format and send it to you.
Is the current display language not your preference? Use the command /lang to set the language.
Project URL: https://github.com/libost/sticker_go
commands.start_desc_private:
👋 Hello! Send me a sticker, and I will convert it to image or video format and send it to you.
Is the current display language not your preference? Use the command /lang to set the language.
Project URL: https://github.com/libost/sticker_go
commands.get: Get the sticker from the replied message
commands.get_desc_nosticker: 🤗 Please reply to a sticker message and use this command!
commands.get_desc_private: 🤗 Please use this command in a group chat!
commands.get_desc_success_deeplink: Click me to get the entire sticker pack
commands.get_desc_failed: 🥺 Failed to get the sticker, please try again later.
commands.help_desc_private:
/start - Start using the bot
/help - Get help information
/usage - View usage information
/lang - Set language
/about - View version information
commands.help_desc_group:
/start - Start using the bot
/get - Get the sticker from the replied message
/help - Get help information
/usage - View usage information
/lang - Set language
/about - View version information
commands.usage_desc_no_record: 😇 You have not used the bot yet.
commands.usage_desc:
🗒️ Usage Information:
Used: %[1]d times
Remaining: %[2]d times
Next refresh: %[3]s%[4]s
commands.about_desc: Version: %[1]s Build time: %[2]s Git commit: %[3]s Branch: %[4]s Project URL: https://github.com/libost/sticker_go
commands.about_desc_group: 😇 Group environment detected, some features are disabled
commands.about_desc_docker: ⚠️ The current environment is Docker, and some features may be limited
commands.donate_disabled: 🤗 Thank you for your kindness, but we are not accepting donations at the moment!
commands.donate_desc_muliplier_enabled: 🎁 Additional Reward: Usage limit increased to %[1]g times the original
commands.getalldonates_notfound: 😐 Currently, there are no donation records.
commands.getalldonates_no_applicants: 😐 There are no donation records that meet the criteria.
commands.refund_expired: 🥺 Sorry, your donation has exceeded the refund period.
commands.refund_desc: 📄 You have the following donation records that meet the refund criteria:
commands.refund_desc_no_applicable: 🥺 There are no valid donation records available for refund application.
commands.getstats_details:
📃 Administrator Statistics:
Total Users: %[1]d
Total Usage: %[2]d
Usage Last Week: %[3]d
Current Cache Usage: %[4]d MB
Current Memory Usage: %[5]d MB
Current Log Usage: %[6]d MB
commands.setadmin_no_records:
✍️ Creating user record.
Please try your command again.
setcommands_desc_list: Start using the sticker download bot
Get the sticker from the replied message
Get help information for the sticker download bot
View version information for the sticker download bot
commands.clearlogs_desc:
🧐 Are you sure you want to clear the logs?
This action cannot be undone!
commands.shutdown_desc:
🤖 Are you sure you want to shut down the bot?
This action cannot be undone!
commands.shutdown_desc_systemd: Warning: The current environment appears to be managed by systemd, and the bot may be restarted automatically after shutdown.
commands.admin_commands_list:
Administrator Command List:
/donaterecord - View all donation records
/getstats - View statistics
/resetusage - Reset usage records
/clearcache - Clear cache
/setcommands - Set command list
/clearlogs - Clear logs
/upgrade - Update the bot
/restart - Restart the bot
/shutdown - Shut down the bot
commands.upgrade_desc_dev: 🤖 The current version is a development version and cannot check for updates.
commands.upgrade_desc_docker: 🤖 The current environment is Docker, and cannot check for updates.
commands.upgrade_desc_failed: 🤖 Failed to fetch the latest version information. Please try again later.
commands.upgrade_desc_latest: 🤖 The current version is the latest available. Version: %[2]s
commands.upgrade_desc_new: 🤖 A new version is available! Latest version: %[2]s Do you want to update?
commands.permission_denied: 😕 You do not have permission to use this command.

callback.donate_disabled: 😕 Donation is currently disabled, temporarily unable to accept donations.
callback.donate_success: 🫡 Thank you for your support! We have received your payment of %[1]d %[2]s.
callback.getpack_toomany: 🥺 The sticker pack contains %[1]d stickers, exceeding the limit of %[2]d stickers per pack.
callback.getpack_toomany_bonus: (_donation bonus: Pack limit has been increased to %[1]g times)
callback.getpack_failed: 🥺 Failed to fetch sticker pack, please try again later.
callback.getpack_toolarge: 📨 The sticker pack is large, and will be sent in parts, a total of %[1]d compressed files.
callback.clearlogs_failed: 🥺 Failed to clear logs, please try again later.
callback.refund_failed: 🥺 Refund request failed, please try again later.
callback.upgrade_failed_generic: 🥺 Failed to download update, please try again later.
callback.upgrade_failed_checksum: 🥺 Failed to download update: Checksum for the corresponding file not found.
callback.upgrade_failed_apply: 🥺 Failed to apply update, please try again later.
callback.upgrade_failed_path: 🥺 Update failed: Unable to determine the current program path.
callback.upgrade_failed_restart: 🥺 Update successful, but failed to restart the bot. Please restart it manually.

general.groupchat_only: 🤗 Please use this command in a group chat!
general.out_of_quota:
🥺 You have reached the usage limit (%[1]d times), please try again later!
For more information, please check /usage
general.subscription_required: 🤖 To support our project and continue receiving free services, please join our official channel %[2]s first. ✅ After joining, please click the command you just sent to continue.
general.subscription_check_failed: 🤖 Subscription check failed, please try again later. Are you sure you have subscribed to our official channel %[2]s?
general.donate_reminder: If you like this project, welcome to use the /donate command to support development
general.donate_reminder_outofquota: 💖 If you like this project, welcome to use the /donate command to support development. Donor users will have their usage limits increased with a bonus multiplier!
general.donated: 🎉 As a donor user, your usage limit has been increased with a bonus multiplier! Thank you for your support!
